calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant
Dept. 505; Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: D. Carter;

Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:12am pausing at 9:13am then resuming at 9:19am and concluding at 9:49am.

Richard Wallace, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiffs Patrick Dibdiak and John Burns.
No appearance by Defendants Fernando Nelson & Sons, et al.

Patrick Dibdiak is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

The court takes judicial notice of the Plaintiff's Application for Prove-up Hearing and Judgment to Quiet Title in Real Property filed 1/15/25.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Patrick Dibdiak et al, and against Fernando Nelson & Sons, et al.

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
